title: ImmortalMobs
description: Make some mobs invulnerable on damage.
body:
# Immortal Mobs
This plugin aims in making some selectable mobs immortal, for the purpose of stopping players of killing harmless mobs. By default, it comes enabled only with Fox, but you can configure everything on the config file. It can make for some really fun moments to make some mobs immortal in your server with your friends, or be used to set rules in the server.

This plugin was originally made by me for my private server, but i find it very useful for other servers then i made it public.

The plugin implements the command /immortalmobs or /im for reload and info.
